Huangqi renifolia doesn't have specific medicinal uses, but Huang Qi (Astragalus membranaceus) has been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments. Huang Qi is believed to have immunomodulatory, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for conditions such as fatigue, weakness, and respiratory issues. It's also thought to have a protective effect on the digestive system and is sometimes used to treat digestive problems. The root of Huang Qi is typically used to make teas, capsules, or extracts for medicinal purposes. Some studies suggest that Huang Qi may also have anti-cancer properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness in this area.
